center.name: Cape Otway
center.summary: Cape Otway是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括笑翠鳥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The laughing kookaburra is native to eastern Australia and has a range that extends from the Cape York Peninsula in the north to Cape Otway in the south

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The laughing kookaburra is native to eastern Australia and has a range that extends from the Cape York Peninsula in the north to Cape Otway in the south
